(Updated: 02 February 2019)
This section focusses on finding and testing audiences and creatives.
Audience Spotlighting Strategy
The 5 main areas I look at to identify new audiences for testing purposes:
- How I conduct audience testing, and why I don't jump straight into my key objective
(whether WC, Lead Gen or other)
- Splitting interests and why
- Rotating ads
- When to graduate audiences to your WC campaign with examples
Part 1 - Research
VIDEO 1
Warning: 'FB Audience Insights Plus' which I have used in the video above to enhance
searches in Audience Manager has gone rogue, injecting ads into your Google search for
monetisation and potentially collecting data on your Chrome activity.
I've now deactivated the plugin myself from my main profile and am currently looking for an
alternative, which I'll update in the video and here if I find one.
For now, if you do want to use the features of FB Audience Insights Plus, what I've done is to
create a new profile in Chrome without any of our other plugins or logins, install FB Audience
Insights Plus and log in to Business Manager to run audience research in Audience Insights.
It will limit any annoyance or data capture caused.

- Tests v Winners
